title: relay.rs: dispatch_peer_retract does not check sender ownership before deleting message
description: daemon/src/relay.rs:501-507 — dispatch_peer_retract() takes message_id and for_all from an MLS-authenticated peer and calls store.soft_delete_message() unconditionally. Any authenticated group member can retract any message in the store by knowing its ID, regardless of whether they sent it. The _from sender parameter is intentionally ignored (underscored). Fix: look up message.sender_id by msg_id and compare with sender pub_id from the relay frame before calling soft_delete_message.
